name: Timeline
summary: A vertical timeline component with a scroll-progress fill line and milestone entries for showcasing chronological content.
detailedDescription: Timeline creates a scroll-driven vertical timeline with entries arranged chronologically. The component features a central vertical line (2px width) with a gradient fill that grows from top to bottom based on scroll progress using Framer Motion's useScroll and useTransform hooks. Each timeline entry consists of a sticky header on the left with a circular marker (10px with inner 4px dot) and a content section on the right. The timeline measures its own height and maps scroll position (from 10% to 50% offset) to the fill line height and opacity. The gradient line transitions from transparent through purple-500 and blue-500 to transparent, creating a glowing effect at the leading edge. The vertical line uses a mask image for soft fade at top and bottom. Desktop layout shows large titles (5xl) next to markers, while mobile shows smaller titles (2xl) above content. Entries are spaced with generous padding (pt-40 on desktop) for scroll room. This component is ideal for changelogs, journey timelines, company history, project milestones, or any chronological narrative.
purpose: Display chronological content with visual progress indicator
Showcase milestones or history with scroll-driven animations
Create engaging narrative flow through time-based content
behavior: Tracks scroll progress to animate fill line height
Fades in fill line opacity from 0 to 1 on scroll start
Uses sticky positioning for entry markers during scroll
Measures container height for accurate progress calculation
Applies gradient mask for soft line edges
Responsive layout switches between desktop/mobile arrangements
visualCharacteristics: Circular markers at each entry point
Fill line grows with scroll progress
Large bold typography for entry titles
Mask gradient fade at line top/bottom
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
